mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, price, quantity, amount) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.productImage}, #{item.price}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.amount})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, price, quantity, amount FROM order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id ASC
